title: Customize WRD Error Messages
text: Customize WRD Error Messages Uniface provides a set of WRD error messages, which you can customize to your liking. To modify the WRD error messages: Locate the appropriate HTML file: WebAppDirectory /error_ Language /err GSS .htm WebAppDirectory —physical directory corresponding to the Web application’s virtual directory, for example UnifaceAPSInstallDir /uniface/webapps/uniface/WEB-INF Language —two-letter code specifying the national language of your errors, for example, en for English, and nl for Dutch. G —one-digit number indicating the group number of the error. Allowed values are: 0 (General) 1 (Server Extension) 2 (Core) 3 (Middleware) 4 (Request) SS —sequential two-digit number, starting at 00 . This, along with the group number, indicates the actual error. In the default Tomcat configuration, you can find English error files under the directory: UnifaceAPSInstallDir /uniface/webapps/uniface/WEB-INF/error_en Modify the error text as required, in keeping with the rest of your web site.
